nodes.name: adr-0001-modular-semantic-pipeline.md
nodes.summary: Sample Architecture Decision Record fixture (ADR-0001) used as an evaluation corpus input, documenting the decision to build a modular semantic pipeline with Status/Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives sections.
nodes.languageNotes: Classic ADR structure (Status, Context, Decision, Consequences, Alternatives Considered) exercising the pipeline's decision-record SectionType detection.

nodes.name: airflow-aip107.md
nodes.summary: Sample Airflow Improvement Proposal (AIP-107) fixture used as evaluation corpus input, covering motivation, problem details, considerations, migration effort, and AIP done criteria.
nodes.languageNotes: AIP-style proposal with Motivation/Considerations/done-criteria headings, exercising decision/done_criteria SectionType detection and cross-corpus entity terms (Airflow, XCom).

nodes.name: impala-vscode.md
nodes.summary: Sample developer how-to fixture used as evaluation corpus input, describing front-end development, unit-test debugging, and Dev Container setup for Impala in VSCode.
nodes.languageNotes: Procedural setup/debug guide with nested Setup sections, exercising code-fence handling and the deployment/overview SectionType rules.

nodes.name: sad-retailnexus-oms.md
nodes.summary: Large Software Architecture Document fixture for the fictional RetailNexus OMS, used as evaluation corpus input — covers system overview, component/integration/data/security/deployment architecture, ADRs, and a risk register.
nodes.languageNotes: Full SAD spanning every SectionType (overview, architecture, api, data_model, security, deployment, decision) plus tables, Kafka topic registry, and an order state machine — a broad multi-section retrieval target.

nodes.name: scripting-on-dtk.md
nodes.summary: Reference/spec fixture used as evaluation corpus input, documenting DTK scripting commands (COPY, SOQLQUERY, BULKDELETE, BULKUPSERT, RECORDCREATE/UPDATE/DELETE, APEXEXECUTE, DEPLOYZIP) with syntax and examples.
nodes.languageNotes: Command-reference doc with heavy code fences and per-command definition sections — a prime target for the --merge-definitions export mode that folds code into the explanation chunk.
